Name: NPC_PLAYER_SKIN_PARAM
Description: Defines skin texture selection and skin tone color values for player-like NPCs.

Fields.Name: Skin Number
Fields.Description: Selects the base skin texture variation.

Fields.Name: Skin Red
Fields.Description: Red color component used for skin tone customization.

Fields.Name: Skin Green
Fields.Description: Green color component used for skin tone customization.

Fields.Name: Skin Blue
Fields.Description: Blue color component used for skin tone customization.
